title: “Charlie spoke repeatedly against women”: Candace Owens challenges Charlie Kirk succession story surrounding Erika Kirk and TPUSA future
summary_full: Candace Owens publicly questioned whether Charlie Kirk truly wanted Erika Kirk to lead TPUSA after his death. Responding to a post from Jammles on X, Owens pointed to Charlie Kirk’s past comments about women in leadership roles and raised concerns about alleged AI-generated audio tied to the announcement. No public legal proof or verified evidence supporting those claims has been released so far.
